mapper.select: select id, username, nickname, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from admin_user where id = #{adminId} and is_deleted = 0
select password from admin_user where id = #{adminId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update admin_user set nickname = #{dto.nickname}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = now() where id = #{adminId} and is_deleted = 0
update admin_user set password = #{encodedPassword}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = now() where id = #{adminId} and is_deleted = 0
